title: Data Science @ ARQ
text:
The Data Science team at ARQ supports research, clinical practice, and organizational decision-making through high-quality data management, statistical modelling, machine learning, and reproducible reporting.
We help colleagues translate complex data into reliable and actionable insights. Our work includes routine outcome monitoring, treatment evaluation, prediction modelling, psychometrics, dashboarding, and methodological consultation.
Our goal is to strengthen evidence-based practice within ARQ by making data analysis transparent, reproducible, and clinically meaningful.

title: Data Science @ ARQ
text:
The Data Science team at ARQ supports research, clinical practice, and organizational decision-making through high-quality data management, statistical modelling, machine learning, and reproducible reporting.
We help colleagues translate complex data into reliable and actionable insights. Our work includes routine outcome monitoring, treatment evaluation, prediction modelling, psychometrics, dashboarding, and methodological consultation.
Our goal is to strengthen evidence-based practice within ARQ by making data analysis transparent, reproducible, and clinically meaningful.

title: Data Science @ ARQ
text:
What we do

Research support
We support researchers with study design, statistical analysis, prediction modelling, and manuscript preparation.


Clinical and organizational insights
We help translate clinical and organizational data into useful insights for treatment evaluation, service improvement, and decision-making.


Reproducible reporting
We develop reproducible workflows for reports, dashboards, and data products.

title: Our work
text:
The Data Science team works across several areas.


We support ROM reporting, outcome monitoring, questionnaire data processing, and automated reporting workflows.



We provide methodological support for research projects, including regression models, mixed-effects models, survival analysis, psychometrics, and prediction modelling.



We explore the use of machine learning methods for clinical prediction, risk stratification, and personalized treatment recommendations.



We contribute to dashboards, interactive reports, and tools that help colleagues explore and interpret data.



We support data cleaning, validation, harmonization, documentation, and reproducible data workflows.

title: People
text:
Methodologist and Data Analyst
Hassan supports research projects with statistical modelling, prediction modelling, reproducible reporting, and data preparation. His interests include longitudinal data analysis, clinical prediction models, psychometrics, and machine learning.

title: Services
text:
The Data Science team can support colleagues with:

Formulating research questions
Study design and analysis plans
Sample size and power calculations
Statistical analyses
Machine learning and prediction modelling
Routine Outcome Monitoring reports
Data cleaning and validation
Dashboards and automated reports
Manuscript methods and results sections
Reproducible R workflows

title: Services
text:
When to contact us
You can contact the Data Science team when you are planning a study, preparing a manuscript, developing a report, working with clinical data, or exploring possibilities for prediction modelling or dashboarding.
